# Generated by openai (gpt-4o-mini)
# Prompt: Write a Deployment Manager template for a complete GCP application stack (Compute Engine, Cloud SQL, Cloud Storage, Load Balancer). Focus on core infrastructure. Skip Cloud Logging and Monitoring configuration to reduce complexity in our initial MVP deployment.
# Category: cloud_monitoring

resources:
  - name: app-instance
    type: compute.v1.instance
    properties:
      zone: $(ref.app-zone.selfLink)
      machineType: $(ref.app-machine-type.selfLink)
      disks:
        - deviceName: boot-disk
          kind: Compute#attachedDisk
          initializeParams:
            sourceImage: projects/debian-cloud/global/images/debian-10-buster-v20200910
            diskType: projects/$(ref.project-id)/zones/$(ref.app-zone)/diskTypes/pd-standard
            diskSizeGb: 10
          autoDelete: true
      networkInterfaces:
        - network: $(ref.network.selfLink)
          accessConfigs:
            - name: External NAT
              type: ONE_TO_ONE_NAT

  - name: app-machine-type
    type: compute.v1.machineType
    properties:
      zone: $(ref.app-zone.selfLink)
      machineType: n1-standard-1

  - name: app-zone
    type: compute.v1.zone
    properties:
      name: us-central1-a

  - name: app-network
    type: compute.v1.network
    properties:
      name: app-network
      autoCreateSubnetworks: false

  - name: app-subnetwork
    type: compute.v1.subnetwork
    properties:
      region: us-central1
      ipCidrRange: 10.0.0.0/24
      network: $(ref.app-network.selfLink)

  - name: app-sql-instance
    type: sqladmin.v1beta4.instance
    properties:
      databaseVersion: MYSQL_5_7
      name: app-sql-instance
      region: us-central1
      settings:
        tier: db-f1-micro
        ipConfiguration:
          authorizedNetworks:
            - value: 0.0.0.0/0

  - name: app-storage-bucket
    type: storage.v1.bucket
    properties:
      name: app-storage-bucket
      location: US
      storageClass: STANDARD

  - name: app-load-balancer
    type: compute.v1.globalAddress
    properties:
      name: app-load-balancer-ip
      addressType: EXTERNAL

  - name: app-backend-service
    type: compute.v1.backendService
    properties:
      name: app-backend-service
      backend:
        - group: $(ref.app-instance.selfLink)
      healthChecks:
        - $(ref.app-health-check.selfLink)

  - name: app-health-check
    type: compute.v1.healthCheck
    properties:
      name: app-health-check
      type: HTTP
      requestPath: /
      checkIntervalSec: 10
      timeoutSec: 5
      healthyThreshold: 2
      unhealthyThreshold: 2

  - name: app-url-map
    type: compute.v1.urlMap
    properties:
      name: app-url-map
      defaultService: $(ref.app-backend-service.selfLink)

  - name: app-target-http-proxy
    type: compute.v1.targetHttpProxy
    properties:
      name: app-target-http-proxy
      urlMap: $(ref.app-url-map.selfLink)

  - name: app-forwarding-rule
    type: compute.v1.globalForwardingRule
    properties:
      name: app-forwarding-rule
      target: $(ref.app-target-http-proxy.selfLink)
      portRange: 80
      IPAddress: $(ref.app-load-balancer-ip.selfLink)
